title: galium odoratum var. eugeniae
intro: Galium odoratum var. eugeniae, also known as the Fragrant Bedstraw or Woodland Bedstraw, is a flowering plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Galium odoratum var. eugeniae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Galium odoratum var. eugeniae can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe digestive issues, calm the nervous system, and promote overall well-being.
